name: Private Cloud Infrastructure
description: VMware Cloud Foundation-based Future Cloud Infrastructure (FCI) with software-defined data centers on Lenovo servers, hosted in climate-neutral European data centers. Provides legacy IT integration paths for customers not ready for full public cloud adoption.
positioning: Safe harbor for enterprises with legacy workloads and strict data residency needs. Bridges the gap between on-premises and cloud-native.
competitive_moat: Existing hosting base, Deutsche Telekom data center footprint across Europe
strategic_risk: VMware licensing uncertainty post-Broadcom acquisition; migration pressure toward sovereign cloud or hyperscaler
